faqs.question: Why are silverfish common in Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Irvington's proximity to the Hudson River creates higher humidity levels, and many of the area's older, historic homes have basements, crawl spaces, and attics that provide ideal conditions for silverfish. These pests are attracted to moisture, paper products, and the starches found in common household items.
